description: Replace the current verify-only executor with a real autonomous loop skeleton: preflight, claim, run verification, on failure perform bounded same-scope repair hooks or emit agent handoff, rerun gates, finish/block with evidence, and continue.
acceptance: Tests prove auto --execute continues across multiple tasks without requiring manual next/claim/finish commands.
Failures produce actionable blocked state or repair follow-up tasks, not a passive summary.

evidence.summary: Upgraded auto --execute result model with commands_run/checkpoints/budget_exhausted, max command/minute budget enforcement, own-lifecycle dirty continuation across multiple tasks, actionable safety/blocked states, and regression test for two-task execution; verification: pytest -q 10 passed; make check passed
